video_prompt: The video depicts a steam train traveling through a snowy, forested landscape. The train is emitting smoke as it moves along the railway track, which is surrounded by snow-covered trees. The sky is overcast with clouds, adding to the wintry atmosphere. The ambient sounds of the steam engine chugging and the clickety-clack of the train wheels on the tracks can be heard throughout the video.
audio_prompt: A steam engine chugging followed by a train whistle blowing
